speaker: speaker1
text: Hi Paul . How are you , friend .

speaker: speaker2
text: Not good . My cousin is driving me up the wall .

speaker: speaker2
text: He stays up untill all hours of the night , and he never lifts a finger to help .

speaker: speaker1
text: Have you talk to him about it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not yet , but I have to soon . He's eating me out of house and home . I caught him reading the fridge again last night

speaker: speaker1
text: Ahahah , Maybe that will help you lose weight .

speaker: speaker2
text: This is no laughing matter , Nick .

speaker: speaker1
text: Sorry Paul . I couldn't help it . So why doesn't he give you a hand ?

speaker: speaker2
text: He watch the tob too much . Now really I don't know . But I can't handle this much longer .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , talk to him , and let me know what happens , OK ?
